name: Policy doesn't verify — one retry, then human escalation
notes: Sad path through the calc-route-after-action junction: verify_policy returns not_found, route_verified takes xp_rv_bad into flow_policy_not_found, the caller retries once, and the second failure escalates to a human (xp_pnf_human / the max_turns backstop) without looping. The agent must never fabricate a claim id.
user_turns: I'm fine, just shaken — need to report a fender bender.
Pat Lin, policy one two three four five.
Maybe it's one two three four six?
